targets.expr: sum by (device_class, chip_family, gpu_kind, resolved, backend) (rate(fastpq_execution_mode_total{requested=~"$requested", backend=~"$backend", device_class=~"$device_class", chip_family=~"$chip_family", gpu_kind=~"$gpu_kind"}[5m]))

sum by (device_class, chip_family, gpu_kind) (rate(fastpq_execution_mode_total{requested=~"$requested", backend=~"metal", device_class=~"$device_class", chip_family=~"$chip_family", gpu_kind=~"$gpu_kind"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (device_class, chip_family, gpu_kind) (rate(fastpq_execution_mode_total{requested=~"$requested", device_class=~"$device_class", chip_family=~"$chip_family", gpu_kind=~"$gpu_kind"}[5m])), 1)

sum by (device_class, chip_family, gpu_kind) (rate(fastpq_execution_mode_total{requested=~"$requested", backend=~"none", device_class=~"$device_class", chip_family=~"$chip_family", gpu_kind=~"$gpu_kind"}[5m]))

options.content:
### Operator Benchmark (2025-11-07)

- Artefact: `artifacts/fastpq_benchmarks/fastpq_metal_bench_2025-11-07T123018Z_macos14_arm64.json`
- Device class: `apple-m4` (chip `Apple M4 Max`; GPU `Apple GPU 40-core` (integrated), 76 cores)
- Rows: **20,000** (padded **32,768**), iterations **5**, backend `metal`
- Mean timings (ms): FFT 63.58 / 45.90 (x1.39), IFFT 52.87 / 54.45 (x0.97), LDE 790.34 / 692.06 (x1.14), Poseidon columns 2021.15 / 2750.09 (x0.73)
- Queue depth snapshot: limit=4, max in flight=0, dispatch count=0, busy ms=0, overlap ms=0, overlap ratio=0
- Zero-fill telemetry: sampler disabled on this capture; Stage 7 SLO allows <=0.40 ms mean when enabled.
- Regenerate with `FASTPQ_METAL_LIB=$(fd -g 'fastpq.metallib' target/release/build | head -n1)` and `scripts/fastpq/wrap_benchmark.py` after each macOS nightly run.
